## Type of Change

<!-- Mark with an `x` the type(s) of change -->

- [ ] 🚀 **Feature** — New functionality
- [ ] 🐛 **Fix** — Bug fix
- [ ] 📝 **Documentation** — Documentation only
- [ ] 🎨 **Style** — Code styling (formatting, no code change)
- [ ] ♻️ **Refactor** — Code restructuring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ **Performance** — Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ **Test** — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] 🔧 **Chore** — Build process, dependencies, CI
- [ ] 🔒 **Security** — Security fix

## Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues: Fixes #123, Closes #456 -->

## Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows [CODE_STYLE.md](../CODE_STYLE.md)
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] No `any` types introduced
- [ ] No `as` casts used

### Testing

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] All tests pass (`pnpm test`)

### Documentation

- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] JSDoc comments added for public APIs
- [ ] Changes documented in CHANGELOG.md

### Architecture

- [ ] Multi-tenant isolation respected (`school_id`)
- [ ] Feature-based module pattern followed
- [ ] No duplicate code introduced
- [ ] Path aliases used (`@core`, `@shared`, `@modules`)
